summary:
KEY FUNCTIONALITY:

The main purpose of this chunk of code is to create a MapReduce specific delegation token secret manager. The secret manager is responsible for generating and accepting the password for each token.

CORE LOGIC:

The code chunk does not contain any key algorithms or processing patterns visible in this chunk.

INPUTS/OUTPUTS:

The code chunk does not contain any data flowing in or out.

DEPENDENCIES:

The code chunk depends on the following classes:

AbstractDelegationTokenSecretManager
DelegationTokenIdentifier

KEY FUNCTIONALITY:

The main purpose of this chunk of code is to define a class that extends the AbstractDelegationTokenSelector class and specializes it for MapReduce.

CORE LOGIC:

The code does not contain any key algorithms or processing patterns visible in this chunk.

INPUTS/OUTPUTS:

The code does not contain any data flowing in or out.

DEPENDENCIES:

The code depends on the AbstractDelegationTokenSelector class and the DelegationTokenIdentifier class.
